headline: Universal Health Services (UHS) Is Down 11.4% After Raising 2026 Earnings Guidance And Expansion Plans - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In late February 2026, Universal Health Services reported past fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results showing higher sales and net income year on year, alongside 2026 guidance calling for further increases in net revenues to about US$18.42–US$18.79 billion and diluted EPS of US$22.64–US$24.52. Management paired this outlook with plans for new acute-care hospitals, expanded behavioral health capacity, and broader AI use across operations, highlighting how growth investments are continuing...

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Universal Health Services, Lowers Price Target to $212
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Stephen Baxter   maintains Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $235 to $212.

headline: A Look At Universal Health Services (UHS) Valuation After A Strong 2025 Earnings Report And Guidance
summary: Universal Health Services (UHS) is back in focus after its Q4 and full year 2025 earnings, where strong revenue and profit figures met a sharp share price drop on slightly mixed quarterly expectations. See our latest analysis for Universal Health Services. That sharp one day share price drop after earnings sits against a mixed backdrop, with a 7 day share price return of 10.58% decline, a 90 day share price return of 13.92% decline, a 1 year total shareholder return of 18.09% and a 3 year...
